verses.text: Tua ciangin Jerusalem khua panin Farisi mite leh Thukham hilh siate, Jesuh kiangah hong pai uh a
“Bang hangin na nungzuite in tangtawng pek panin a hong kihilh suksuk i pupa ngeinate zuilo uh ahi hiam? Amaute in an a nek ma-un a ngeina ding bangin a khut uh sil masa lo uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Jesuh in, “Bang hangin note in na pupa ngeina uh zui-in, Pasian' thupiakna palsat zawsop na hi uh hiam
Pasian in, ‘Na nu leh na pa na zahtak in,’ ci a, tua banah, ‘A nu ahi a, a pa ahi zongin a gensiate in thahna thuak ding hi,’ ci lai hi

Ahi zongin note in, ‘Mi khatpeuh in a nu ahi a, a pa ahi zongin a huh theihna ding na khat peuhpeuh a neih leh, tua na pen Pasian-a' ding hi, ci peuh leh, a nu leh a pa piak kul nawnlo hi,’ ci-in thu na hilh uh hi
Tua ahih manin na pupa ngeina uh na zuihna uh hangin Pasian' thu na palsat uh hi
Na tungthamun mihoih a kineihkhem mite aw, Isaiah in note' thu a genna man mahmah hi. Tua a genna-ah
‘Hih mite in a kampi bek uh tawh kei hong zahtak bawl uh a, ahi zongin a lungsim taktak uh kei tawh kigamla hi
Mihingte' bawltawm thukhamte, Pasian' thukham zahin mite tungah hilh uh ahih manin kei hong biak hangun a kiman'na omlo hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in ama kiangah mihonte sam a, “Ka thugen na ngai un la, hoihtakin na theitel un
Kam sungah a tumsuk nate in mi ninsaklo a, kam sung panin a pusuak nate in mi a ninsak hizaw hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin nungzuite in Jesuh kiangah, “Farisi mite in hih na thugen a zak uh ciangin na a sak mahmahna thu uh na thei hiam?” a ci uh hi
Jesuh in, “Vantungah a om ka Pa' suan a hilo kung khempeuh kibotkhia ding hi
Hih mite lunghihmawh ngaihsut kei un. Amaute pen mittaw makai ahi uh hi. Mittaw khat in mittaw dang khat makaih leh a nihun hawkguam sungah kiakhawm ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Ahi zongin Peter in Jesuh kiangah, “Hih thugentehna a khiatna kote hong hilh in,” a ci hi
Jesuh in, “Note nangawn in theilo a, tello na hi uh hiam
Kam sungah a tumsukte pen gil sung tawnin tua panin paikhiasuak hilo ahi hiam
Ahi zongin kam sung panin a pusuakte pen lungsim panin hong kipankhia hi a, hihte in mi ninsakthei hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh lungsim panin mi thahnopna, mi zi tawh mawhnopna, nungak tawh mawhnopna, guktakna, zuau genna, mi gensiatna, leh ngaihsut hoihlo a tuamtuam hong piangkhia hi
Hih bang nate in mi ninsak a, khut silloin annekna in mi ninsaklo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.
Tua lai panin Jesuh paikhia a, Taia khuapi leh Sidon khuapi gamsung tengah a zin hi
Tua gamah a teng Kanaan nupi khat hong pai-in hong kiko a, “David' suan, Topa aw, kei hong hehpih in. Ka tanu in dawi vei a, nasia mahmah hi,” ci-in a hong thum hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in kam khat beek paupihlo hi. Tua ciangin a nungzuite in Jesuh kiangah, “Hih nupi i nung zui-in kikoko ahih manin a ciahna dingin sawl in,” ci-in a thum uh hi
Jesuh in, “Tuu bangin a mangthang Israel mite lak bekah kei hong kisawl hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Ahi zongin tua nupi hong pai-in Jesuh' mai-ah khukdin' a, “Topa aw, kei hong huh in,” a ci hi
Jesuh in, “Tate' annek ding laksakin ui khawite piak ding kilawm lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Nupi in, “Hi mah hi, Topa aw; a topa sabuai tung panin a kia annengte, ui khawite in zong nebuang hilo ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in tua nupi kiangah, “Nupi aw, na upna lian taktak hi. Na deihna bangin hong piang ding hi,” ci-in a dawn' khit ciangin a tanu thakhatin a dampah hi.
Tua lai panin Jesuh paikhia-in Galilee Tuili kiimah a pai hi. Mualtung lamah kahto-in a tu hi
Ama kiangah mihon tampi tak hong pai uh a, khebaite, khezawte, mittawte, a pau theilote, leh cina dang tampi, Jesuh kiangah hong koih uh hi. Jesuh in tuate khempeuh a damsak hi

A pau theilote pau thei-in, khezawte damin, khebaite hoihtakin lam paithei-in, mittawte in khua a muh theihkikna thu mihonpite in a muh uh ciangin lamdangsa mahmah uh a, Israel mite' Pasian a phat uh hi.

Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite sam a, “Kei kiangah hih mite ni thum bang hong omkhin uh a, amaute in annek ding nei nawnlo uh ahih manin hehpihhuai ka sa hi. Lamkalah cimawh khading uh ahih manin gilkialin ka ciahsak nuam kei hi,” a ci hi
Nungzuite in, “Mihon hih zah i piak ding, hih gamlakah koi panin an ngah ding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Jesuh in, “Anlum bangzah nei na hi uh hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Lum sagih leh ngasa neu tawm khat om hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in leilakah mihonte a tutna dingin a sawl hi
Anlum sagih leh a ngasate la-in Pasian tungah lungdamna a koh khit ciangin balnenin a nungzuite tungah pia a, a nungzuite in mihonpite mai-ah a lui uh hi
Mihonte in ne-in a kham khit uh ciangin a khamval a neng a themte tawmkik uh a, paipel lian sagih a dim hi
Tua an a ne mite, numei leh naupang simloh, pasal cingteng mihing tul li ahi hi
Jesuh in mihonte a ciahsak khit ciangin gunkuang tungah tuangin Magadan gamah a pai hi.
